emails.subject: Job Information
emails.body: Job Information Good afternoon Ms. Thurston. Attached is the job posting per our conversation. Have a groovy hip one. (Smile) SR SERVICE SPECIALIST ESSENTIAL FUNCTIONS: Overall implementation and contract compliance accountability. Responsible for Deal profitability validation and reporting. Bill payment, invoicing and reporting validation and issue resolution. Drive internal and external communications to ensure customer satisfaction and customer referenceability. ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS: Bachelor's Degree and three years experience in industry-related field. Individual must be detail-oriented with ability to synthesize information from a number of sources. Ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously. Self-starter, must seek out possible problems and propose/facilitate timely resolution. Strong communication skills are necessary for interface with all levels of the organization, external service providers, and internal customers to ensure that customer expectations, as related to service requests, are resolved in a timely manner. PREFERRED SKILLS: Strong customer service orientation needed. Proficiency with MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Lotus Notes (email). Proficiency with Internet usage. Access and Siebel a plus. SPECIAL CHARACTERISTICS: Excellent communication skills are required. Process-oriented, analytical and quality-oriented thinking is a must. Work efforts will be project-oriented and will focus on results and delivery. Team orientation is a must. Minimal travel may be required. Work effort will be results-oriented in a fast-paced environment. CONTACT: NA. Job ID 0000110083 Department EES SERVICE MANAGEMENT II Company WHOLESALE, RETAIL COMM ENRON ENERGY SERVICES Location HOUSTON, TX Type Pay n/a FLSA class Manager HURT,ROBERT Recruiter JTAORMINA Log n/a Grade CP17.01.01 Response NA Relocation N Posting date 03-OCT-01 To respond to this job posting Make a note of: the job ID, position name, department name, and company name. Then fill in this form. An Equal Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer This page is maintained by the Enron Corp Web Team. Email questions/comments to recruitment.technology.helpdesk@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Job Information
emails.body: RE: Job Information You're the best, Thanks Otha.....I mean Ora!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Job Information
emails.body: RE: Job Information YOU ARE WELCOME MY FRIEND............I'M GLAD TO KNOW YOU'RE STILL CHECKING YOUR E:MAILS. (SMILE)

emails.subject: RE: Job Information
emails.body: Girl, Is Fanette Perry still here? and no. 2, have you seen Jewel Meeks, she's lost a ton of weight and looks like her old self again. To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Job Information
emails.body: You are soooooooooooooo late.....(Smile) Yes, I've seen Jewel, i tried to show her to you once before we were headed to the garage. Yes, the looks great. I asked her what was her secret and she said medical, plus a lot of prayer. I just wanted to know what she took to lose it. (Smile) I heard that Cynthia lost a lot too. And Fannette has been gone almost a year now. (Smile) She's also into Real Estate. To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Job Information
emails.body: Fannette in real estate........"shut yo mouth"....Angie and I are going to the Dance Theatre of Harlem tonight at jones hall and then we are going out. Is jones hall fancy, should i look real good, or just good? To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Job Information
emails.body: Just good would be sufficient. (Smile). Its on the same order as the Civic Auditorium in Omaha (Smile) To: Mims, Patrice L.
